---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Mio
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve, or what is the current limitation?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, references, or related issues. Note: Mio is MiMo-first — new
providers or release infrastructure need a design discussion first (see
CONTRIBUTING.md).
